message:
test(mission): golden vector regression tests for full planner pipeline (ft-1i2ge.2.8)

Add 12 golden vector tests with fixed DAG fixture (5 beads, 2 agents)
testing the complete pipeline: readiness → features → scoring → solving →
explainability → governor → config resolution. Verify determinism,
ranking stability, profile-aware scoring, and score bounds. 185 total
tests in planner_features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
